values.description: Production API origin (same host as OpenAPI: https://api.hyrelog.com/openapi.json)
Production internal token — matches ECS INTERNAL_TOKEN / Secrets Manager hyrelog-prod/INTERNAL_TOKEN (x-internal-token)
Live company API key (hlk_co_…)
Live workspace API key (hlk_ws_…)
API company UUID in production
API workspace UUID in production
API project UUID in production
API key ID for revoke/rotate operations
Webhook ID from create webhook response
Webhook secret from create webhook response (shown only once!)
Auto-set by Get Webhook Deliveries tests (length of v1 response.data)
Current plan tier (FREE, STARTER, GROWTH, ENTERPRISE)
Export job ID from create export response (auto-extracted by Postman Tests)
Production DASHBOARD_SERVICE_TOKEN — required for all /dashboard/* requests
Dashboard company UUID - for Provision Company body and GET /dashboard/companies/:id
Dashboard workspace UUID - for Provision Workspace, archive, restore, key sync
API company ID from Provision Company response - set x-company-id for company-scoped dashboard routes
API workspace ID from Provision Workspace response (optional)
Dashboard API key UUID - for Sync Key body and Revoke Key path
Archive object ID - for Create Restore Request body
Restore request ID - for Get/Cancel/Approve/Reject restore
Plan UUID from Admin List Plans - for Assign Plan to Company
